title: Relative position
description: Decide if objects are above, below, beside, in front of, or behind other objects.

assessment_items.question_content:
**In which picture is the ![A cow.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2cfff6d544b162e5d05255e4430e1d71.png) BESIDE the ![A chick.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/05cb27ccbf13c4cd2d0af1a8cef238f2.png)	?**


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The  ![A cow.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2cfff6d544b162e5d05255e4430e1d71.png) is BESIDE the ![A chick.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/05cb27ccbf13c4cd2d0af1a8cef238f2.png)	in this picture:   
![Row 1 has a cow and a chick. Row 2 has a pig and a pony. Row 1 is shaded as the correct answer.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/23c5da272d44bfaaac85b5913f87abb1.png)

choices.content: ![Row 1 has a cow and a chick. Row 2 has a pig and a pony.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c2246f344aa5a19291b2519094913f30.png)
![Row 1 has a chick and a pig. Row 2 has a pony and a cow.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/33f189fb6a2123f62fe8f05c712498c4.png)
